I think there was some sort of a camp there.

I guess real flirty and the pushovers and whatever, like where they crashes like, yeah, sure, we're late.

Who cares?

Oh, and then he's like, well, you know, when this happens, this is I was like, well, really, this is a problem if this just keeps happening.

I'm like, I was like, you know, I go, I'm just going to be honest with you.

Your guy's job is to drive a car.

If you're not proficient in driving a car, I go, "You can't be a good ballet guy if you don't even have to drive a car.

If you can't even do that right, really, where are you going in the world?

If you can't park a car.

And he's like, " no, he goes, " I'm so sorry."

I go, well, you didn't crash the car.

He goes, " no.

He goes, "But you know what?

I'm his manager."
